description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City has designated public and private facilities as cooling shelters (air-conditioned rest areas) that open when heat stroke special warning alerts are issued.

【Operating Period】
April 22, 2026 (Reiwa 8) through October 28, 2026 (Wednesday)

【How to Use】
• Facilities open during their regular hours when an alert is issued
• Please follow the instructions of each facility
• Keep noise to a minimum in the lobby areas

【Main Facilities】

【Hanno District】
• Children's Library (Inari-cho 25-8) Tue–Sun & holidays, last Friday of month 11:00–16:00 Capacity: 3 people
• Hanno Municipal Library (Yamate-cho 19-5) Tue–Sun & holidays, last Friday of month 9:30–18:00 Capacity: 9 people
• Hanno Museum (Hanno 258-1) Tue–Sun 9:30–16:30 Capacity: 5 people
• Hanno Central District Administrative Center (Hanno 60-1) Weekdays 9:00–16:30 Capacity: 15 people
• Maruhiro Department Store Hanno Branch, 7th Floor Citizen Activities Center (Sakae-cho 24-4) Mon–Sun 10:00–19:00 Capacity: 5 people
• Maruhiro Department Store, 6th Floor Rest Area (Sakae-cho 24-4) Mon–Sun 10:00–19:00 Capacity: 5 people
• Other: Post offices, pharmacies

【Other Districts】
Administrative centers, welfare centers, post offices, and similar facilities are available in each district.

※Parking at the Citizen Activities Center and Maruhiro Department Store parking lot requires a fee.
※For detailed opening hours and capacity information, please contact each facility directly.

【Contact】
Health Center 042-974-3488

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/10102.html
summary: ℹ️ Cooling shelters open during extreme heat alerts
